# CGPDFContentStreamRef

**Type Alias**

An opaque type that provides access to the data that describes the appearance of a PDF page.

## Declaration

```swift
typealias CGPDFContentStreamRef = OpaquePointer
```
title: CGPDFContentStreamRef
